name: alpinia officinarum
title: alpinia officinarum benefits
description: Alpinia officinarum relieves nausea, which is a symptom characterized by a feeling of discomfort or queasiness in the stomach, often leading to vomiting. This benefit is crucial, especially in individuals who experience motion sickness while traveling, pregnant women who experience morning sickness, and patients undergoing chemotherapy who may suffer from nausea and vomiting as a side effect.
